title: Where'd I Wake Up
description: Where'd I Wake Up is an addon onto various map mods. It allows players to choose their respawn location depending on Beds.
body:
![Banner!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d30861d4550769f7300bafd28031110c19bb767d.png) # Where'd I Wake Up – A Respawn System for Map Mods Where'd I Wake Up is an addon for Minecraft map mods that allows players to choose their respawn location directly through the interface of supported map mods. Instead of respawning at your latest bed, players can pick from a list of saved respawn points upon death. # Features * **Choose Your Respawn Point:** When you die, the mod will open the map interface, allowing you to select your respawn location. * **Save Respawn Points:** Beds can be saved as respawn locations either when placed or when slept in, configurable via the mod's settings. * **Customizable Config Options:** * **MaxSavedBeds** – Set the maximum number of beds that can be saved as respawn points. * **SaveBedsSleptIn** – Toggle whether only beds you've slept in should be saved. * **SaveBedsPlaced** – Toggle whether beds should be saved as respawn points when placed. # Supported Mods ✅ Xaero's Minimap & Xaero's World Map (Both required) # Planned Support ⏳ Antique Atlas
⏳ JourneyMap # Compatibility ✔️ Forge (1.20.1)
❌ NeoForge (Xaero doesn't support NeoForge)
❌ Fabric (Xaero's mods are still in beta and unstable on Fabric, but development is ongoing!)
